title: The English and Foreign Languages University Act, 2006
full_text: The English and Foreign Languages University Act, 2006 अंग्रेजी और विदेशी भाषा विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200707 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 2007-01-10 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The English and Foreign Languages University Act, 2006 Hindi Title: अंग्रेजी और विदेशी भाषा विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching University for promotion and development of English and other Foreign Languages and their Literature, and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 03-08-2007 Notification: 3rd August 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 1350(E), dated 1st August, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The English and Foreign Languages University Act, 2006 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the University. Section 4. Dissolution of the Central Institute of English and Foreign Languages, Hyderabad Society and transfer of all the properties and effect of establishment of the University. Section 5. Objects of the University. Section 6. Powers of the University. Section 7. Jurisdiction. Section 8. University open to all classes, castes and creeds. Section 9. Visitor. Section 10. The Chief Rector. Section 11. Officers of the University. Section 12. The Chancellor. Section 13. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 14. The Pro-Vice-Chancellor. Section 15. The Deans of Schools. Section 16. The Registrar. Section 17. The Finance Officer. Section 18. The Controller of Examinations. Section 19. The Librarian. Section 20. Other officers. Section 21. Authorities of the University. Section 22. The Court. Section 23. The Executive Council. Section 24. The Academic Council. Section 25. The Schools of Studies. Section 26. The Finance Committee. Section 27. Other authorities. Section 28. Powers to make Statutes. Section 29. Statutes how to be made. Section 30. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Annual report. Section 33. Annual accounts. Section 34. Returns and information. Section 35. Conditions of service of employees. Section 36. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 37. Right to appeal. Section 38. Provident and pension funds. Section 39. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 40. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 41. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 42. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 43. Mode of proof of University record. Section 44. Power to remove difficulties. Section 45. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 46. Transitional provisions. Schedule 1.
